---
title: "Project Submission"
format: html
---

Use this form to submit work to the grading queue.
Creating a pull request on your repo and/or tagging instructors *will not* count as submission.

See more about how to submit work for D2M-R in the [GitHub submissions guidelines](assessment/misc/gh-submissions.qmd).

*Form not appearing? [Open in a new tab](https://nrdowling.notion.site/ebd//2ca7b904f28d80519a9ac671d8ef7b87).*

::: {#notion-frame style="border:2px solid black;" }

<iframe src="https://nrdowling.notion.site/ebd//2ca7b904f28d80519a9ac671d8ef7b87" width="100%" height="600" frameborder="0" allowfullscreen />

:::
